_sync: When you add GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY, run: python3 scripts/fetch_google_reviews.py to replace this file with live Google reviews.
placeName: AXIS SPORT - Personal Training & Gym JBR

reviews.author: Omar H.
reviews.text: Best PT studio in JBR — coaches know their stuff, equipment is spotless, and sessions actually push you without feeling rushed. Highly recommend if you want real results.

reviews.author: Lisa K.
reviews.text: I've trained at a few gyms in Dubai; this one stands out for attention to detail and programming. The vibe is professional but friendly. Worth every dirham.

reviews.author: James R.
reviews.text: Solid gym with great trainers. Space is compact but well laid out. Only minor wait for a rack at peak hours — otherwise five stars.

reviews.author: Nour A.
reviews.text: Love the energy here. Trainers track progress properly and adjust workouts when I travel. Feels like a proper sports facility, not a generic chain.
